records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. gymno`s naked + nw^tos the back: cf. F. gymnote.]

defs: A genus of South American fresh-water fishes, including the Gymnotus electricus, or electric eel. It has a greenish, eel-like body, and is possessed of electric power.
quotes: One fearful shock, fearful but momentary, like that from the electric blow of the gymnotus.
